ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars received by the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the programming language used in the repository */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the repository's metadata was last updated */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the repository */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the repository's code is released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programming language */,
  "creators" TEXT /* Names of the creators of the programming language */,
  "paradigm" TEXT /* Programming paradigm(s) the language follows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_tags" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tag */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was added to the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, guest) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes on the comment */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes on the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_comments_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the repository has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the repository */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors to the repository */,
  "average_view_duration" INTEGER /* Average time spent by visitors on the repository page (in seconds) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor record */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being contributed to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user contributing to the repository */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, issue) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit that contains the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_contributors_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
